evidence_summary: Execute the political climax of the Thark arc through a formal council confrontation. The scene requires high-stakes dialogue transitioning into a sanctioned duel, necessitating precise choreography and controlled environmental shifts to reflect the change...

In a formal council, John Carter challenges Tal Hajus's leadership based on his cowardice. This leads to a sanctioned duel between Tars Tarkas and Tal Hajus. Tars Tarkas emerges victorious, becoming Jeddak and elevating Carter to chieftain status.
